meta.name: example-academy
meta.description: PiFlow Academy — a 2-node demo of per-node capability isolation (separation of concerns). A RESEARCH node reaches the outside world through the deepwiki MCP tool but has NO shell; a BUILD node has a shell and implements + tests the result but has NO internet. The data-only handoff (findings.md) keeps the lethal trifecta split across nodes, so an injection in fetched content lands on a node that cannot escalate. Security thesis + sources: docs/research/2026-06-27-per-node-capability-isolation.md. Also exercises external-MCP-in-sandbox (research) + coding-in-sandbox (build) on E2B.
